title: Particl Copay 5.4.1 Released
excerpt: Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the Particl mobile application to the latest Copay codebase version…
custom_excerpt: Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the Particl mobile application to the latest Copay codebase version…

primary_tag.name: Development Updates
primary_tag.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

tags.name: Development Updates
tags.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

plaintext:
Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the Particl
mobile application to the latest Copay codebase version. This upgrade includes a
variety of bug fixes and usability/stability improvements as well as support for
multiple cryptocurrencies (BTC & BCH). This release is a major one for Particl
Copay because, while it doesn’t yet include all the features mentioned in our 
Particl Copay focused development update
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-mobile-app-update-6bc8cd04f48] published
last week, it sets the stage and makes the mobile application ready to support
the bigger features coming in future releases by putting the most recent Copay
codebase into place.

You can download the latest version of Particl Copay directly on our Github page
by following this link: https://github.com/particl/copay/releases

particl/copay [https://github.com/particl/copay/releases]
Copay is a secure bitcoin wallet platform for both desktop and mobile devices.
-
particl/copay [https://github.com/particl/copay/releases]github.com
[https://github.com/particl/copay/releases]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Changelog
 * Bump Particl Copay’s codebase to the latest version (5.4.1)
 * Multi-currency support (BTC & BCH) added
 * Major UI/UX improvements
 * Various security, usability, and stability improvements
 * Minor bug fixes


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
html:
Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the Particl mobile application to the latest Copay codebase version. This upgrade includes a variety of bug fixes and usability/stability improvements as well as support for multiple cryptocurrencies (BTC & BCH). This release is a major one for Particl Copay because, while it doesn’t yet include all the features mentioned in our Particl Copay focused development update published last week, it sets the stage and makes the mobile application ready to support the bigger features coming in future releases by putting the most recent Copay codebase into place.

You can download the latest version of Particl Copay directly on our Github page by following this link: https://github.com/particl/copay/releases

particl/copay
Copay is a secure bitcoin wallet platform for both desktop and mobile devices. - particl/copaygithub.com

Changelog

  • Bump Particl Copay’s codebase to the latest version (5.4.1)
  • Multi-currency support (BTC & BCH) added
  • Major UI/UX improvements
  • Various security, usability, and stability improvements
  • Minor bug fixes
